options.label: A
options.text: The total amount of energy produced by a device

options.label: B
options.text: The ratio of useful energy output to total energy input

options.label: C
options.text: The speed at which energy is transferred

options.label: D
options.text: The cost of running an electrical device

correct_answer: The ratio of useful energy output to total energy input
explanation: Energy efficiency compares how much useful work or energy a device produces compared to how much energy you put into it. A more efficient device wastes less energy as heat or other losses.
